subject: [PATCH pynfs v2 07/25] server41tests: test rename triggers dir delegation recall

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a test to the server41tests suite to verify that when a file is renamed from a second client, it triggers a directory delegation recall on the first client. The test creates a directory delegation with no notification mask, then creates a file and renames it from the second client. It checks that the server issues a CB_RECALL in response.
